'''pasana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogathon|yogathon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogathon|yogathon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pasana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæsænæth|pæsænæth]] || [[word:pæsænæj|pæsænæj]] || [[word:pæsænæsh|pæsænæsh]] || [[word:pæsænæ|pæsænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasasanath|pasasanath]] || [[word:pasasanaj|pasasanaj]] || [[word:pasasanash|pasasanash]] || [[word:pasasana|pasasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasanath|pasanath]] || [[word:pasanaj|pasanaj]] || [[word:pasanash|pasanash]] || [[word:pasana|pasana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasafnath|pasafnath]] || [[word:pasafnaj|pasafnaj]] || [[word:pasafnash|pasafnash]] || [[word:pasafnaf|pasafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pasanatha|pasanatha]] || [[word:pasanaja|pasanaja]] || [[word:pasanasha|pasanasha]] || [[word:pasanaka|pasanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pasanath|pasanath]] || [[word:pasanaj|pasanaj]] || [[word:pasanash|pasanash]] || [[word:pasana|pasana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pasanathal|pasanathal]] || [[word:pasanajal|pasanajal]] || [[word:pasanashal|pasanashal]] || [[word:pasanakal|pasanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pasanathatha|pasanathatha]] || [[word:pasanajaja|pasanajaja]] || [[word:pasanashasha|pasanashasha]] || [[word:pasanaka|pasanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pasanathan|pasanathan]] || [[word:pasanajan|pasanajan]] || [[word:pasanashan|pasanashan]] || [[word:pasanakan|pasanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pasanathaoro|pasanathaoro]] || [[word:pasanajaoro|pasanajaoro]] || [[word:pasanashaoro|pasanashaoro]] || [[word:pasanakaoro|pasanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
